title: {name} im Schwimmbad
moral: Water safety and trying new things builds confidence

beats.beat: Title page — {name} in a swimsuit and arm floats, standing at the pool edge
Packing the swim bag at home — towel, goggles, sunscreen, {companion} watches
Driving to the pool in {city} — {name} can see the building from the car
Arriving at the swimming pool — big glass doors, the smell of chlorine, echoing voices
Changing rooms — {parent} helps {name} into the swimsuit, locker for shoes
Shower before the pool — cold water surprise, {name} squeals and giggles
Seeing the pool for the first time — big blue water, splashing kids, a slide
{name} hesitates at the edge — the water looks deep and cold
{parent} goes in first, reaches out arms — 'I'll catch you'
First step on the pool stairs — water touching toes, then ankles, then knees
Holding onto {parent}'s hands — bouncing in waist-deep water
{parent} puts on arm floats — {name} feels more secure, starts kicking
Blowing bubbles in the water — {name} puts face near the surface, blows hard
Floating on back — {parent} supports {name}'s head, looking up at the ceiling
Kicking practice — holding a kickboard, {name} zooms across the baby pool
Splash fight with {parent} — water flying everywhere, both laughing
Another child waves — they play catch with a pool ball together
Trying the small slide — whoosh into the water, {parent} catches at the bottom
One more swim across with the kickboard — {name} feels like a real swimmer
Time to get out — wrapping up in a big towel, teeth chattering a little
Hot chocolate at the pool cafe — warming up, {name} swings feet happily
Getting dressed — {name} tells {parent} about the favorite part
Driving home — {name} asks 'Can we come back next week?'
Bedtime — {name} hugs {companion}, whispers about swimming, falls asleep dreaming of water

vocabulary_constraints.toddler: max 8 words per sentence, 3-4 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.preschool: max 12 words per sentence, 4-5 sentences per page
vocabulary_constraints.early-reader: max 15 words per sentence, 5-7 sentences per page
